items.title: My Personal Website

about.title: Who am I?
paragraphs: I grew up studying in various international schools in particular Shanghai Community International School, Dulwich College Shanghai and Sha Tin College Hong Kong.
During my free time, I write blog posts to reflect on my experiences as a software engineer, helping me organize my thoughts and consolidate my learning.
You can find out more about me in the about section.
